film.title: Chaalbaaz
film.overview: Twins separated at infancy are brought up differently. One weak, one strong. One day, they end up at each others house. Their life is not the same anymore.

dialogues.dialogue: And we' ll he 50-50 partners in the inheritance. - Shall I go? - He's lying! - I never saw him before! - Shameless! I' ll sort her out later. First lets check out Anju-Manju. - Tell us, who is she? - She, she...She's my daughter, Manju.
I love so dearly You are my love, you are my faith. . .  you are my pride, you are my aspiration I speak the truth, I swear it on you. . .  you are not just my wife, you mean the life to me

But I can't face the child's mother Vijay, this isn't Sheetal. It's Vinita's mother speaking I'm proud of you. I accept the decision you have taken So jailer? What news? When am I being released? Bad news for you, Bhai-ji

Shall I cart the villain away, sir? - Shut up You are my love, you are my faith. . .  you are my pride, you are my aspiration I speak the truth, I swear it on you. . .  you are not just my wife, you mean the life to me
Good grief! The best of guys get floored on seeing her! -She's the pride of our colony. -The pride of your colony? - Anju? - Not Anju, but Manju. You may hit me but she's Manju of our colony.
